    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "envoy/stats/stats.h", "symbol": "Counter"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "envoy/stats/stats.h", "symbol": "Gauge"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "envoy/stats/stats.h", "symbol": "Histogram"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "envoy/stats/stats.h", "symbol": "TextReadout"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "envoy/stats/tag.h", "symbol": "Tag"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "envoy/stats/tag_extractor.h", "symbol": "TagExtractor"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "envoy/stats/tag_producer.h", "symbol": "TagProducer"}
  ],
  "text": "The Envoy stats system is implemented across multiple layers in envoyproxy/envoy repository:\n\n## Core Symbol Table and Name Interning\nThe foundation is the `SymbolTable` (source/common/stats/symbol_table.h, .cc) which implements stat name interning using variable-length byte encoding. The `StatNamePool` class (defined within symbol_table.h) provides a convenient way to add and manage stat names without reference counting. `StatName` objects are lightweight references to interned names in the symbol table.\n\n## Scope Hierarchy\nThe primary implementation of the Stats::Scope hierarchy is in `ThreadLocalStoreImpl` (source/common/stats/thread_local_store.h, .cc). This class implements the `StoreRoot` interface and contains a nested `ScopeImpl` class that extends the abstract `Scope` interface (envoy/stats/scope.h). The scope system supports nested scopes with prefix composition and provides thread-local caching for fast stat lookup. Each scope manages a central cache of counters, gauges, histograms, and text readouts.\n\n## Stat Allocation and Metric Implementation\nThe `AllocatorImpl` class (source/common/stats/allocator_impl.h, .cc) manages the creation and lifetime of stat objects. The `MetricImpl` template (source/common/stats/metric_impl.h, .cc) provides the base implementation for all metrics and uses a `MetricHelper` class to manage stat names and tags. The `HistogramImpl` (source/common/stats/histogram_impl.h, .cc) and `ThreadLocalHistogramImpl` classes provide histogram-specific implementations, with `ParentHistogramImpl` coordinating thread-local histogram merging.\n\n## Tag Extraction from Metric Names\nTag extraction is implemented in two main components:\n1. `TagProducerImpl` (source/common/stats/tag_producer_impl.h, .cc) which orchestrates a collection of tag extractors\n2. `TagExtractorImplBase` (source/common/stats/tag_extractor_impl.h, .cc) and its subclasses which perform regex-based extraction of tags from metric names\n3. `TagUtility::TagStatNameJoiner` (source/common/stats/tag_utility.h, .cc) which combines stat names with extracted tags\n\n## Stat Sink Dispatch System\nThe `Sink` interface (envoy/stats/sink.h) defines the contract for stat sinks. The `MetricSnapshot` class provides a snapshot of all metrics for flushing. Multiple sink implementations exist:\n\n### Statsd-based Sinks\n- `UdpStatsdSink` and `TcpStatsdSink` (source/extensions/stat_sinks/common/statsd/statsd.h, .cc) - Core statsd implementation with configurable tag formats\n- Configuration for standard statsd, DogStatsd, and Graphite statsd variants (source/extensions/stat_sinks/statsd/config.h, source/extensions/stat_sinks/dog_statsd/config.h, source/extensions/stat_sinks/graphite_statsd/config.h)\n\n### Prometheus Support\n- `MetricsServiceSink` (source/extensions/stat_sinks/metrics_service/grpc_metrics_service_impl.h, .cc) - Implements prometheus format via gRPC metrics service\n- `MetricsFlusher` class - Handles conversion of Envoy metrics to prometheus client protobuf format (io::prometheus::client::MetricFamily)\n- The metrics service dispatches metrics to external metrics collection services that support prometheus format\n\n### Other Sinks\n- `HystrixSink` (source/extensions/stat_sinks/hystrix/hystrix.h, .cc) - Streaming metrics for hystrix dashboard\n- `OpenTelemetryGrpcSink` and `OtlpMetricsFlusher` (source/extensions/stat_sinks/open_telemetry/open_telemetry_impl.h, .cc) - OpenTelemetry metrics export\n- `WasmStatSink` (source/extensions/stat_sinks/wasm/wasm_stat_sink_impl.h) - WASM-based custom sink\n\n## Supporting Components\n- `StatsMatcherImpl` (source/common/stats/stats_matcher_impl.h, .cc) - Filters which stats are created/flushed based on configuration\n- `IsolatedStoreImpl` (source/common/stats/isolated_store_impl.h, .cc) - Standalone stats store for testing and isolated contexts\n- `CustomStatNamespacesImpl` (source/common/stats/custom_stat_namespaces_impl.h, .cc) - Manages custom stat namespace registration\n- Null implementations (null_counter.h, null_gauge.h, null_text_readout.h) - No-op stats for disabled metrics\n- Tag formats (source/extensions/stat_sinks/common/statsd/tag_formats.h, .cc) - Defines various tag format standards\n\n## Public API\nThe public API is defined in the envoy/stats/ directory:\n- `allocator.h` - Allocator interface\n- `scope.h` - Scope interface with methods to create and find metrics\n- `sink.h` - Sink interface and MetricSnapshot\n- `store.h` - Store/StoreRoot interface\n- `stats.h` - Counter, Gauge, Histogram, and related interfaces\n- `tag.h` - Tag data structures\n- `tag_extractor.h` and `tag_producer.h` - Tag extraction interfaces\n\nThe entire system is designed for high-performance metric collection with minimal contention through thread-local storage and symbol table interning."
}

conversation_events.text:
# Envoy Stats Scope and Tag Architecture

## Your Task

Find all C++ source files in envoyproxy/envoy that implement the stats system: the Stats::Scope hierarchy, the tag extraction from metric names, the stat name interning (StatNamePool), and the stat sink dispatch for Prometheus and statsd output.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the org domain.

## Available Resources

The local `/workspace/` directory contains: sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2, sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367, sg-evals/go-control-plane--71637ad6, sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e.

**Note:** Additional repositories are accessible via Sourcegraph MCP tools:
- `sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2` (envoyproxy/envoy)
- `sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367` (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
- `sg-evals/go-control-plane--71637ad6` (envoyproxy/go-control-plane)
- `sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e` (grpc/grpc)

## Output Format

Create a file at `/workspace/answer.json` with your findings in the following structure:

```json
{
  "files": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go"}
  ],
  "symbols": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "SymbolName"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "FunctionName"}
  ],
  "text": "Narrative explanation of your findings, citing repos and file paths."
}
```

Include only the fields relevant to this task. Your answer is evaluated against a closed-world oracle — completeness matters.

## Evaluation

Your answer will be scored on:
- **File recall and precision**: Did you find all relevant files?
I'll help you find all C++ source files implementing the Envoy stats system. Let me start by exploring the repository structure and then systematically search for the components you mentioned.
Now let me create the comprehensive answer file with all the relevant files I've found:
Let me verify the answer file was created correctly:

Perfect! I've successfully identified and documented all the C++ source files implementing the Envoy stats system. Here's a summary of what I found:

## Summary

I've created a comprehensive `answer.json` file documenting **67 files** across the Envoy repository that implement the stats system:

### **Core Components Found:**

1. **Symbol Table & StatNamePool** (source/common/stats/symbol_table.*)
   - Implements stat name interning with efficient variable-length byte encoding
   - `StatNamePool` provides convenient name management

2. **Scope Hierarchy** (source/common/stats/thread_local_store.*)
   - `ThreadLocalStoreImpl` - Main implementation of `StoreRoot`
   - `ScopeImpl` - Nested scope implementation with prefix composition
   - Thread-local caching for fast stat lookup

3. **Stat Allocation** (source/common/stats/allocator_impl.*)
   - Manages creation and lifetime of metric objects
   - Provides reference counting and memory management

4. **Metric Implementations** (source/common/stats/metric_impl.*, histogram_impl.*)
   - `MetricImpl` - Base template for all metrics
   - `HistogramImpl` - Heap-based histograms
   - `ParentHistogramImpl` - Thread-local histogram merging

5. **Tag Extraction** (source/common/stats/tag_*_impl.*)
   - `TagProducerImpl` - Orchestrates tag extraction
   - `TagExtractorImplBase` - Regex-based tag extraction
   - `TagStatNameJoiner` - Combines names with extracted tags

6. **Stat Sink Dispatch System**:
   - **Statsd sinks**: UDP and TCP implementations with DogStatsd and Graphite variants
   - **Prometheus support**: Via `MetricsServiceSink` using gRPC metrics service with Prometheus protobuf format
   - **Additional sinks**: Hystrix, OpenTelemetry, WASM

All files have been documented in `/workspace/answer.json` with their repository location and key symbols defined within each file.

  "text": "The Envoy stats system is implemented across multiple layers in envoyproxy/envoy repository:\n\n## Core Symbol Table and Name Interning\nThe foundation is the `SymbolTable` (source/common/stats/symbol_table.h, .cc) which implements stat name interning using variable-length byte encoding. The `StatNamePool` class (defined within symbol_table.h) provides a convenient way to add and manage stat names without reference counting. `StatName` objects are lightweight references to interned names in the symbol table.\n\n## Scope Hierarchy\nThe primary implementation of the Stats::Scope hierarchy is in `ThreadLocalStoreImpl` (source/common/stats/thread_local_store.h, .cc). This class implements the `StoreRoot` interface and contains a nested `ScopeImpl` class that extends the abstract `Scope` interface (envoy/stats/scope.h). The scope system supports nested scopes with prefix composition and provides thread-local caching for fast stat lookup. Each scope manages a central cache of counters, gauges, histograms, and text readouts.\n\n## Stat Allocation and Metric Implementation\nThe `AllocatorImpl` class (source/common/stats/allocator_impl.h, .cc) manages the creation and lifetime of stat objects. The `MetricImpl` template (source/common/stats/metric_impl.h, .cc) provides the base implementation for all metrics and uses a `MetricHelper` class to manage stat names and tags. The `HistogramImpl` (source/common/stats/histogram_impl.h, .cc) and `ThreadLocalHistogramImpl` classes provide histogram-specific implementations, with `ParentHistogramImpl` coordinating thread-local histogram merging.\n\n## Tag Extraction from Metric Names\nTag extraction is implemented in two main components:\n1. `TagProducerImpl` (source/common/stats/tag_producer_impl.h, .cc) which orchestrates a collection of tag extractors\n2. `TagExtractorImplBase` (source/common/stats/tag_extractor_impl.h, .cc) and its subclasses which perform regex-based extraction of tags from metric names\n3. `TagUtility::TagStatNameJoiner` (source/common/stats/tag_utility.h, .cc) which combines stat names with extracted tags\n\n## Stat Sink Dispatch System\nThe `Sink` interface (envoy/stats/sink.h) defines the contract for stat sinks. The `MetricSnapshot` class provides a snapshot of all metrics for flushing. Multiple sink implementations exist:\n\n### Statsd-based Sinks\n- `UdpStatsdSink` and `TcpStatsdSink` (source/extensions/stat_sinks/common/statsd/statsd.h, .cc) - Core statsd implementation with configurable tag formats\n- Configuration for standard statsd, DogStatsd, and Graphite statsd variants (source/extensions/stat_sinks/statsd/config.h, source/extensions/stat_sinks/dog_statsd/config.h, source/extensions/stat_sinks/graphite_statsd/config.h)\n\n### Prometheus Support\n- `MetricsServiceSink` (source/extensions/stat_sinks/metrics_service/grpc_metrics_service_impl.h, .cc) - Implements prometheus format via gRPC metrics service\n- `MetricsFlusher` class - Handles conversion of Envoy metrics to prometheus client protobuf format (io::prometheus::client::MetricFamily)\n- The metrics service dispatches metrics to external metrics collection services that support prometheus format\n\n### Other Sinks\n- `HystrixSink` (source/extensions/stat_sinks/hystrix/hystrix.h, .cc) - Streaming metrics for hystrix dashboard\n- `OpenTelemetryGrpcSink` and `OtlpMetricsFlusher` (source/extensions/stat_sinks/open_telemetry/open_telemetry_impl.h, .cc) - OpenTelemetry metrics export\n- `WasmStatSink` (source/extensions/stat_sinks/wasm/wasm_stat_sink_impl.h) - WASM-based custom sink\n\n## Supporting Components\n- `StatsMatcherImpl` (source/common/stats/stats_matcher_impl.h, .cc) - Filters which stats are created/flushed based on configuration\n- `IsolatedStoreImpl` (source/common/stats/isolated_store_impl.h, .cc) - Standalone stats store for testing and isolated contexts\n- `CustomStatNamespacesImpl` (source/common/stats/custom_stat_namespaces_impl.h, .cc) - Manages custom stat namespace registration\n- Null implementations (null_counter.h, null_gauge.h, null_text_readout.h) - No-op stats for disabled metrics\n- Tag formats (source/extensions/stat_sinks/common/statsd/tag_formats.h, .cc) - Defines various tag format standards\n\n## Public API\nThe public API is defined in the envoy/stats/ directory:\n- `allocator.h` - Allocator interface\n- `scope.h` - Scope interface with methods to create and find metrics\n- `sink.h` - Sink interface and MetricSnapshot\n- `store.h` - Store/StoreRoot interface\n- `stats.h` - Counter, Gauge, Histogram, and related interfaces\n- `tag.h` - Tag data structures\n- `tag_extractor.h` and `tag_producer.h` - Tag extraction interfaces\n\nThe entire system is designed for high-performance metric collection with minimal contention through thread-local storage and symbol table interning."
}
